docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,031.27 FILED BY LEUTHOLDT, AMELIA AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, KEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-03-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, KEN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEUTHOLDT, AMELIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUU, KEN $2,031.27 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,141.27 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, KEN
